scope: M5 Batch 026 draft. Adds weather-routing and navigation-warning reinforcement: route weather warnings, wind shifts, swell/visibility changes, waypoint avoidance, and warning/advice/readback boundaries. Draft only; not merged into starter and not deployed.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Weather routing is route planning around weather, not traffic routing, generic voyage planning, or a warning message.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Weather routing is route planning around weather, not traffic routing, generic voyage planning, or a warning message.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Squall line must not become swell, shore, or traffic line.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Squall line must not become swell, shore, or traffic line.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Warning must not soften into advice or become traffic/clear route.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Warning must not soften into advice or become traffic/clear route.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: In-force navigation warning must not become cancelled, weather-only, or advice.
qa_notes.linguist_note: In-force navigation warning must not become cancelled, weather-only, or advice.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Route alteration to starboard must not become port, course-only, or keep route.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Route alteration to starboard must not become port, course-only, or keep route.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Route alteration to port must not become starboard, course-only, or keep route.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Route alteration to port must not become starboard, course-only, or keep route.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Avoiding waypoint Alpha must not become proceeding, Bravo, or cancellation.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Avoiding waypoint Alpha must not become proceeding, Bravo, or cancellation.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Proceeding to waypoint Bravo must not become avoidance, Alpha, or holding.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Proceeding to waypoint Bravo must not become avoidance, Alpha, or holding.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Wind shift direction must not become south-west, swell, or steady wind.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Wind shift direction must not become south-west, swell, or steady wind.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Visibility value and reduced/improved polarity must stay exact.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Visibility value and reduced/improved polarity must stay exact.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Heavy swell direction and severity must not become east, wind, or moderate.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Heavy swell direction and severity must not become east, wind, or moderate.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Cancelled route must not become active/advised or a weather warning cancellation.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Cancelled route must not become active/advised or a weather warning cancellation.

items.source_text: Изменить маршрут на курс ноль девять ноль из-за погоды.
items.target_text: Alter route to zero nine zero due to weather.
accepted_answers: Alter route to zero nine zero due to weather.

should_accept: Alter route to zero nine zero due to weather.
should_reject: Alter route to zero six zero due to weather
Alter course to zero nine zero due to traffic
Maintain route zero nine zero due to weather
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Route, heading, and reason must stay exact.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Route, heading, and reason must stay exact.

items.source_text: Изменить маршрут на курс один два ноль из-за погоды.
items.target_text: Alter route to one two zero due to weather.
accepted_answers: Alter route to one two zero due to weather.

should_accept: Alter route to one two zero due to weather.
should_reject: Alter route to zero nine zero due to weather
Alter course to one two zero due to traffic
Maintain route one two zero due to weather
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Route heading 120 and weather reason must stay exact.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Route heading 120 and weather reason must stay exact.

items.source_text: Держаться в двух милях от подветренного берега.
items.target_text: Keep two miles off the lee shore.
accepted_answers: Keep two miles off the lee shore.

should_accept: Keep two miles off the lee shore.
should_reject: Keep five miles off the lee shore
Keep two miles off the windward shore
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Distance and lee-shore hazard boundary must stay exact.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Distance and lee-shore hazard boundary must stay exact.

items.source_text: Избегать точки Альфа из-за сильной зыби.
items.target_text: Avoid waypoint Alpha due to heavy swell.
accepted_answers: Avoid waypoint Alpha due to heavy swell.

should_accept: Avoid waypoint Alpha due to heavy swell.
should_reject: Proceed to waypoint Alpha due to heavy swell
Avoid waypoint Bravo due to heavy swell
Avoid waypoint Alpha due to heavy traffic
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Avoid/proceed, waypoint name, and swell reason must stay exact.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Avoid/proceed, waypoint name, and swell reason must stay exact.

items.source_text: Следовать к точке Браво после прохождения шквала.
items.target_text: Proceed to waypoint Bravo after squall passes.
accepted_answers: Proceed to waypoint Bravo after squall passes.

should_accept: Proceed to waypoint Bravo after squall passes.
should_reject: Proceed to waypoint Alpha after squall passes
Avoid waypoint Bravo after squall passes
Proceed to waypoint Bravo before squall passes
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Waypoint and before/after squall timing must stay exact.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Waypoint and before/after squall timing must stay exact.

should_reject: Navigation warning cancelled for area Charlie
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Warning area and warning/advice/cancelled status must stay exact.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Warning area and warning/advice/cancelled status must stay exact.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Advice must not become warning/navigation or wrong area.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Advice must not become warning/navigation or wrong area.

should_reject: Gale warning cancelled in area Delta
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Gale warning area/status must stay exact.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Gale warning area/status must stay exact.

items.source_text: Ожидается смена ветра на два семь ноль в полдень.

accepted_answers: Wind shift to two seven zero expected at noon.

should_reject: Wind shift to two four zero expected at noon
Swell shift to two seven zero expected at noon
Wind shift to two seven zero expected at midnight
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Wind direction and time must stay exact.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Wind direction and time must stay exact.

items.source_text: Ветер заходит против часовой стрелки после один восемь ноль ноль.
items.target_text: Wind backing after one eight zero zero.
accepted_answers: Wind backing after one eight zero zero.

items.source_text: Видимость менее одной мили в восточном секторе.

accepted_answers: Visibility less than one mile in east sector.

should_reject: Visibility more than one mile in east sector

Visibility less than one mile in west sector

items.source_text: Видимость улучшается после один шесть ноль ноль.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Swell height and direction must stay exact.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Swell height and direction must stay exact.

items.target_text: Do not enter the shallow-water route.
accepted_answers: Do not enter the shallow-water route.

should_accept: Do not enter the shallow-water route.
should_reject: Do not leave the shallow-water route
Do not enter the deep-water route
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Do-not-enter polarity and route type must stay exact.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Do-not-enter polarity and route type must stay exact.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Recommended route must not become cancelled/prohibited or shallow-water.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Recommended route must not become cancelled/prohibited or shallow-water.

items.source_text: Временный маршрут закрыт до ноль шесть ноль ноль.

items.source_text: Повторить: изменить маршрут на ноль девять ноль.

items.source_text: Доложить, когда выйдете из линии шквалов.

items.source_text: Избегать опасности по пеленгу ноль четыре пять от точки Альфа.

items.source_text: Использовать запасной маршрут севернее района Дельта.
